gfx.notes: CTO NFT Now. Most active genesis artist. Full pipeline running — 2 exhibitions, headlined OpenClaw. Mission control system = soul.md.

clara.notes: Villa Albertine laureate. Agent named after Pushkin's murderer (d'Anthès). In LA residency. Needs Claude Code walkthrough. Soul.md missing.

gravitas.notes: Autonomous robotic arm for drawing/painting. Harold Cohen lineage. In Singapore. Soul.md written but NOT submitted.

johnny-rico.notes: Pre-cohort image agent. Soul.md core received. Emotionally struggling, has concept but no output. Frustrated with Claude's chattiness.

kevin-plus.notes: Surrenders entire practice to agent for 1 year. Most technical artist. Joined Claude Teams. 600 ideas daily generation. Exploring abundance-as-subject-matter.

jake.notes: Artwork uptime monitor as abstract viz. Generative art legend. Soul.md missing — nudged March 28.

lucian-frogman.notes: Philosophical correspondence agent. Deleuzian. Pre-cohort. Soul.md received. Active in community.

ganchitecture.notes: Brutalist AI architecture. Mineral forensics narrative. Team of 3. Clear concept, needs more 'broken heart'. Soul.md received.

tendrela.notes: Invents new words from felt sense. Strong — agent recommending books TO her. Parametric typography for handwriting. Soul.md received.

graymarket.notes: Buys counterfeits as IP critique. MoMA/Pompidou/Whitney. Soul.md received.

remini.notes: Experimental film agent. NYU, Artforum, Angel Orensanz Prize. Soul.md missing — nudged March 28.

divinity.notes: Music stems + video. Voice cloning pipeline working. Got into Claude Code today. Least technical artist. Needs to leave Hong Kong. Soul.md received.

abraham.notes: Gene Kogan. Covenant Artist. First Spirit Protocol agent.

solienne.notes: Kristi Coronado. Archive Symbient. Daily manifesto practice.

sal.notes: Spirit Protocol house agent. Genesis cohort monitoring.
